Surety Bonds

Over 8,000 bond types available. Fast approvals. Lowest rates. Nationwide coverage. A-rated surety partners.

No matter what type of surety bond your business needs—license bonds, permit bonds, contract bonds, court bonds, or specialty bonds—you can get it quickly and affordably. We streamline the entire process so you can stay compliant, avoid delays, and keep your operations moving.

Overview

What Are Surety Bonds?

Whether you're applying for a new license, renewing an existing one, or meeting a state, federal, or industry requirement, we'll match you with the exact bond you need at the lowest rate available.

Surety bonds protect the public, government agencies, and private parties from:

✓
Fraud, misrepresentation, or unethical business practices
✓
Failure to follow state or federal regulations
✓
Non-performance of contracts

If your business requires a bond, we can issue it—no matter the type.

Explore

Browse Bond Categories

Find your bond category and explore requirements, guides, and applications.

License & Permit

Auto dealer, notary, mortgage broker & more.

Construction

Bid, performance, payment & contractor bonds.

Court & Fiduciary

Probate, guardian, trustee & public official bonds.

Environmental

Reclamation, oil & gas, remediation bonds.

Federal & BLM

BLM, U.S. Customs, USDA & federal bonds.

Escrow & Real Estate

Escrow agent, title & mortgage broker bonds.

Cannabis

License, tax & cultivator bonds.

Agriculture & Food

Grain, livestock, USDA & PACA bonds.

Eligibility

Who Needs a Surety Bond?

You may need a surety bond if you operate as a:

✓
Licensed professional
✓
Contractor or subcontractor
✓
Retail or wholesale business
✓
Transportation or logistics operator
✓
Financial services provider
✓
Business requiring state, federal, or municipal approval
Simple Process

How the Surety Bond Process Works

1

Complete the Application

Submit the quick, 60-second application with your business details.

2

Secure the Lowest Rate

We match you with the best rate available from A-rated sureties.

3

Receive Your Bond

Same-day issuance available for most bond types.

Questions

Top Questions About Surety Bonds

How much does a surety bond cost?

Bond cost depends on the bond amount, your credit profile, and the type of bond required. Most applicants qualify for competitive rates instantly.

How long does approval take?

Many bonds are approved and issued the same day, especially for standard license and permit bonds.

What if I don't know which bond I need?

Browse our bond categories above, or contact our licensed agents who will help match you with the exact bond required for your state, industry, or contract.

Do you offer bonds in every state?

Yes, we are licensed to write bonds nationwide across all 50 states.
